headline: Reflecting On Consumer Discretionary - Casino Operator Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN)
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at consumer discretionary - casino operator stocks, starting with Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN).

headline: Authentic Brands Group reshuffles leadership, hints at IPO
summary: Authentic Brands Group has announced changes to its executive team, with founder Jamie Salter stepping into the role of executive chairman, and Matt Maddox appointed as president and chief executive officer.

raw.headline: Authentic Brands Group reshuffles leadership, hints at IPO
